name: academorix/marketplace-fee
purpose: Marketplace fee capture — FeeSchedule + FeeApplication + FeePayout aggregates for platform-fee take-rate on tenant transactions.
capabilities: FeeSchedule aggregate (fsc_ prefix) — per-tenant fee config
FeeApplication (fap_ prefix) — one row per fee-charged transaction
when_to_use: Academorix operates as a marketplace platform and takes a fee on tenant-processed transactions.
when_not_to_use: For payouts to third-party sellers, use academorix/payout. For subscription revenue, use academorix/subscription.
